diagrams.title: Linux User Privilege Levels
diagrams.description: Hierarchy showing UID levels: UID 0 (root) at top with full access, UID 1-999 (system users), UID 1000+ (regular users)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how UID determines privilege levels in Linux

diagrams.title: su vs sudo Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing key differences between su and sudo commands
diagrams.purpose: Visualize differences for quick recall during exams

diagrams.title: Sudo Configuration Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how sudo authentication works: user runs sudo → check sudoers → verify password → execute command → log action
diagrams.purpose: Understand sudo authentication and authorization process

visuals.title: Becoming The Super User
visuals.description: Visual diagram for becoming the super user
